name: Inversion
what_it_is: Instead of "how do I achieve X?", ask "what would guarantee I fail at X?" then avoid those things.
core_mechanic: State the goal. Invert it completely. Generate all the ways you could cause the opposite outcome. Treat each as a risk to avoid. Combine with the forward analysis.
when_to_use: Any session where optimism bias might be limiting analysis. Pairs especially well with the Skeptic.
when_not_to_use: When failure modes are already obvious and the forward analysis is underdeveloped.
ideaos_application: Agent 3 runs inversion on its own output as a self-check - "if this structure were wrong, what would make it wrong?" - before handoff to Agent 4.
